input.background: Determine whether numbers in the exercise are parameters or statistics based on a study of breast cancer cases in California.
input.question: A study of 1225 of these cases finds that survival varied greatly by stage of diagnosis. The average 7-year survival rate for stage I breast cancer was 92%.

sample_size.description: The number of breast cancer cases included in the study.

stage_of_diagnosis.description: The stage of breast cancer diagnosis being studied.

survival_rate.description: The average 7-year survival rate for stage I breast cancer, expressed as a percentage.
